round62_reference.winner_reason: Best weighted ultra-low repair score with no protected-scale regression penalty; preserves 1x/0.10x/0.08x and improves the 0.03x pain set.

round63a_reference.winner_reason: Best protected no-regression SCD-only ultra-low branch score versus Round61 across the 0.05x / 0.03x target set.

r63b_combo_floor_off_r62soft.description: Exact Round62 winner plus the Round63-A floor-off rule: below 0.08x disable the iter2 once-per-phase SCD entirely.
r63b_combo_floor_off_r62soft.rationale: Direct combination baseline. Tests whether Round62’s ultra-low alpha-guard is already enough to absorb the SCD-off tradeoff.

round63b_extra_patch.name: r63b_combo_floor_off_r62soft
round63b_extra_patch.description: Exact Round62 winner plus the Round63-A floor-off rule: below 0.08x disable the iter2 once-per-phase SCD entirely.
round63b_extra_patch.rationale: Direct combination baseline. Tests whether Round62’s ultra-low alpha-guard is already enough to absorb the SCD-off tradeoff.

selection.note: Partial combo signal: Ka_xx improves against Round62, but yy / rx_y / overall do not combine cleanly.

r63b_combo_floor_off_003only.description: Keep the Round62 winner intact through 0.05x, and only at 0.03x disable the iter2 once-per-phase SCD.
r63b_combo_floor_off_003only.rationale: Weaker floor-off variant. If 0.05x is still in the sweet spot, this localizes the SCD ablation to the deepest ultra-low regime only.

round63b_extra_patch.name: r63b_combo_floor_off_003only
round63b_extra_patch.description: Keep the Round62 winner intact through 0.05x, and only at 0.03x disable the iter2 once-per-phase SCD.
round63b_extra_patch.rationale: Weaker floor-off variant. If 0.05x is still in the sweet spot, this localizes the SCD ablation to the deepest ultra-low regime only.

selection.note: Partial combo signal: Ka_xx improves against Round62, but yy / rx_y / overall do not combine cleanly.

r63b_combo_alpha09995_r62soft.description: Round62 winner plus a milder ultra-low SCD alpha: below 0.08x change once-per-phase SCD alpha from 0.999 to 0.9995.
r63b_combo_alpha09995_r62soft.rationale: Alpha-weaken variant from Round63-A. Keeps the SCD body alive, but softens the cut enough that Round62 guard may handle the remaining ultra-low overshoot.

round63b_extra_patch.name: r63b_combo_alpha09995_r62soft
round63b_extra_patch.description: Round62 winner plus a milder ultra-low SCD alpha: below 0.08x change once-per-phase SCD alpha from 0.999 to 0.9995.
round63b_extra_patch.rationale: Alpha-weaken variant from Round63-A. Keeps the SCD body alive, but softens the cut enough that Round62 guard may handle the remaining ultra-low overshoot.

selection.note: Partial combo signal: Ka_xx improves against Round62, but yy / rx_y / overall do not combine cleanly.

r63b_combo_core3_r62soft.description: Round62 winner plus a smaller ultra-low SCD target: below 0.08x keep SCD only on the Round61 backbone trio dKg_xx / dKg_xy / dKg_zz.
r63b_combo_core3_r62soft.rationale: Target-weaken variant from Round63-A. Keeps the SCD idea only on the three states that still looked structurally helpful, while Round62 guard handles yy / Ka_xx-side overshoot.

round63b_extra_patch.name: r63b_combo_core3_r62soft
round63b_extra_patch.description: Round62 winner plus a smaller ultra-low SCD target: below 0.08x keep SCD only on the Round61 backbone trio dKg_xx / dKg_xy / dKg_zz.
round63b_extra_patch.rationale: Target-weaken variant from Round63-A. Keeps the SCD idea only on the three states that still looked structurally helpful, while Round62 guard handles yy / Ka_xx-side overshoot.

selection.note: No useful combination signal: alpha-guard + this SCD rule does not beat the current Round62 / Round63-A tradeoff.

best_candidate.name: r63b_combo_alpha09995_r62soft
best_candidate.reason: Partial combo signal: Ka_xx improves against Round62, but yy / rx_y / overall do not combine cleanly.

no_winner_reason: No candidate achieved a clean protected-scale combo win over both Round62 and Round63-A; keep Round62 as mainline and treat Round63-B as an exploratory branch only.
